title: 🔑 API Keys
subtitle: Create keys to let external systems (CRM, forms, orchestrators) drive TaskMgr through the v1 API.
emptySubtitle: Create your first key to connect an external system. The plaintext will be shown only once — copy it at creation time.

actions.revokeConfirm: Revoke this key? Any integration using it will lose access immediately. Cannot be undone.

createModal.title: Create a new API key
createModal.name: Name
createModal.scopeReadOnly: Read only — perfect for a dashboard or external reporting.
createModal.scopeReadWrite: Read-write — create and update work orders, clients, addresses. Recommended.
createModal.scopeAdmin: Admin — includes tenant settings. Reserve for integrations that truly need it.
createModal.expiresAtHint: Leave empty for a key that never expires.

revealModal.title: ✅ Key created
revealModal.warning: ⚠️ Copy this key now — it will never be shown again. If lost, revoke it and create a new one.
